name: Cow
hint: A large domesticated mammal raised for milk, meat, or draft purposes.

name: Sheep
hint: A domesticated ruminant mammal valued for its wool and meat.

name: Pig
hint: A domesticated omnivorous mammal raised for meat.

name: Chicken
hint: A domesticated bird primarily raised for its meat and eggs.

name: Horse
hint: A large hoofed mammal used for riding, racing, and work purposes.

name: Goat
hint: A sure-footed mammal often raised for milk, meat, and fiber production.

name: Duck
hint: A waterfowl with broad bills and webbed feet, often raised for meat and eggs.

name: Turkey
hint: A large poultry bird often raised for its meat, particularly during holidays.

name: Donkey
hint: A domesticated mammal known for its strength and used for work purposes.

name: Rabbit
hint: A small mammal often raised for its meat and fur.
